body_txt: Someone seems at first to be worried about someone else or feeling sympathy for them, but it turns out they are actually thinking something very different. If a particularly unkind character is doing this, then they may be a Jerk with a Heart of Jerk . Sub-trope for No Sympathy . Often a Bait-and-Switch Comment . May double with Refuse to Rescue the Disliked if someone invokes this by suggesting helping someone when they are in a bad situation but then laughing it off as they don't really care about the person being in the state, or Skewed Priorities if someone appears to be worried about someone, only to reveal that they're more interested in something inconsequential. Compare Bait-and-Switch Sentiment . Contrast to HA HA HA—No where a character laughs at something but gets serious.
